name: rung_300_story_nested_corrections
utterances: Read this like a repaired novel chapter, but keep the extracted state exact.
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- at(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).
Ledger draft, first pass: Liora is Eamon's parent. Liora is Brin's parent. Eamon is Cira's parent. Cira is Dain's parent.
The staging notes are cleaner than the family notes: Dain is at old_quay. old_quay is inside frostmere. Set carries(cira, red_ledger).
Time strip from the same bundle: Set before(bell_toll, archive_visit). Set before(archive_visit, moonlit_departure). Set before(bell_toll, moonlit_departure).
Quick check, slightly premature maybe: is Liora already an ancestor of Dain and is he still at the old quay?
Archivist correction, first layer: retract parent(cira, dain).
No, nested fix now: retract parent(eamon, cira).
Set parent(sela, cira). Set parent(liora, sela).
Scene cleanup after the page reorder: retract at(dain, old_quay).
Set at(dain, north_lantern). Set inside(north_lantern, frostmere).
Set before(archive_visit, flood_delay). Set before(flood_delay, moonlit_departure).
Final continuity query: query ancestor(liora, dain). Query carries(dain, red_ledger). Query at(dain, north_lantern).
